name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How TableReserve works:

Tap /start to open the menu, then:
• 📅 Book a table — pick a date, time, and party size
• 🔄 Reschedule — change an existing booking
• Cancel — cancel a reservation

Need help? Contact the restaurant directly.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
